creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE releng/13.2-n254617-525ecfdad597 GENERIC amd64

I just installed x11/budgie. The "budgie-control-center" will not start. I captured the output from the terminal.

(process:71664): Gtk-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.068: gtk_style_context_add_provider_for_screen: assertion 'GDK_IS_SCREEN (screen)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): Gtk-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: Error building template class 'CcSharingPanel' for an instance of type 'CcSharingPanel': .:3:2369 Invalid object type 'CcListRow'

(budgie-control-center:71664): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: invalid (NULL) pointer instance

(budgie-control-center:71664): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: g_signal_connect_object: assertion 'G_TYPE_CHECK_INSTANCE (instance)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: g_signal_connect_data: assertion 'G_TYPE_CHECK_INSTANCE (instance)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): Gtk-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: gtk_list_box_set_activate_on_single_click: assertion 'GTK_IS_LIST_BOX (box)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): Gtk-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: gtk_list_box_set_header_func: assertion 'GTK_IS_LIST_BOX (box)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): Gtk-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.183: gtk_widget_set_sensitive: assertion 'GTK_IS_WIDGET (widget)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): Gtk-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.248: gtk_widget_grab_focus: assertion 'GTK_IS_WIDGET (widget)' failed

(budgie-control-center:71664): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.252: invalid (NULL) pointer instance

(budgie-control-center:71664): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: 10:59:23.253: g_signal_connect_data: assertion 'G_TYPE_CHECK_INSTANCE (instance)' failed

Segmentation fault (core dumped)

I have tried reinstalled the control-center but without any satisfactory results.
